{{CargoClone
|name=Gang Leader
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=110
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Gene Simulation Power Checks -1.5%
|}}
